titleStmt.title: SII 22.251: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 251. (A.R. No. 251 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. MAHĀMAṆḌALĒŚVĀRA VIRUPPAṆA-UḌAIYĀR VIRŪPĀKSHA II—Śaka 1303 (Wrong for 1304).

summary.p: This is dated in Dundubhi, Mīna, śu. 5, Wednesday, Uttiram corresponding to A.D. 1383. The details given are irregular. It registers the sale of a plot of wet and dry lands called Iḷaiyaperumāḷ-tāṅgal belonging to the temple as tirunāmattukkāṇi, for 50 paṇam to a certain Iḷaiyaperumāḷ son of Māchchāttaṉ who is one of the three persons mentioned in No. 248 above. With this amount the temple authorities are stated to have repaired the breach in the local tank called the Śaḍaiyēri which had left the lands of the whole village uncultivated and fallow for a long time.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman mahāmaṇṭaliśvara Ariyaṇa Uṭaiyar kumārar viruppaṇa Uṭaiyaṟkuc cellāniṉṟa śakāptam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟumuṉṟiṉmel cellāniṉṟa tuntupi samvaṟsarattu minanāyaṟṟu ghūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum putaṉkiḻa
maiyum peṟṟa Uttirattunāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattuk kāliyūr koṭṭattuk kaḻumalanāṭṭup piramatecappaṟṟut tiruppaṉaṅkāṭu Āḷuṭaiyārkku tiruppaṉaṅkāṭu Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi tiruppaṉaṅkāṭṭil vaṭapāṟ kellai yiḷanaṅkaṉ puṟavaṭai
Āṉa Iḷaiyaperumāḷ tāṅkalukku Ellai niṟcayittapaṭi Oḻukkai pākkattil Ellaikku meṟku tuṟaiyaṉūṟpaṭṭil Ellaikku teṟku Ivvūṟkup pokiṟa vaḻikkuk kiḻakku cuntaraṉāyaṉār kālukku vaṭakku Uṭpaṭṭa nañcey puñcey
Inta nāṟpāṟkellaikkuḷḷu tirunāmattukkāṇi taṇṭeśvaravilai Āka Iṉṉāyiṉār koyilil tiruviḷakku maṉṟāṭikaḷil māccāttaṉ makaṉ Iḷaiya perumāḷukku kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉam Āka viṟṟa
� 5 10 Ippaṇam Aiympatum tiruppaṉaṅkāṭṭil caṭaieri neṭunāḷāka matakile Uṭaintu matakum paṟintu Aṭaikka mutalillāmal Ūr Aṭaṅkaluṅ kaḻani neṭunāḷāka pāḻ Ākik kiṭantapaṭi Āle Inta
Eri Uṭaippukku Erikkuḻi Āka veṭṭuvittu Aṭaippittom Inta Iḷaiyaperumāḷukku Ittāṅkal viṟṟoṟṟi piṟatikreya tāyatānaṅkaḷukku Urittāva tāka viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom
Ikkoyilil māheśvararum tānattārum Om Ivai Iḷaiyaperumāḷ tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cirāḻvāṉ tillaikkūtta paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.251 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
